falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5000 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout above a key resistance level would contradict the current HOLD signal and suggest a strong trend reversal, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average of the CBOE VIX crosses below 20
falsification_conditions.what_it Would_mean: A sustained drop in volatility below 20 would indicate reduced fear and a potential end to the pattern's bearish dynamics, directly contradicting the current UNKNOWN/ HOLD assessment.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in the blowoff score would signal imminent extreme price movement, invalidating the current HOLD by proving a clear directional bias exists.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
